==Translingual==
{{ja-forms|監|[[监]]|監}}

===Alternative forms===
* {{l|mul|𰯲}} {{qualifier|when used at the top of a character}}

Note the difference in the upper right component between mainland China, where it is ⿱𠂉丶 (resembles half of [[𥫗]]), and Taiwan, Hong Kong and Japan, where it is ⿱𠂉一.

==Chinese==
{{zh-forms|s=监|alt=𧗄,譼,𧨭,𧩾}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
{{Han compound|臥|皿|ls=ic|t1=a person with an emphasized eye|t2=container}}: a person looking into a container ({{zh-ref|Ji Xusheng, 2004}}). Original form of {{och-l|鑑|mirror}}. 
The container later corrupted into {{och-l|*血}}; in the regular script, this additional stroke has migrated to below the {{och-l|*人}} → {{lang|zh|sc=Hani|⿱𠂉丶}}/{{lang|zh|sc=Hani|⿱𠂉一}}.

===Etymology===
Compare {{cog|my|ကြံ|t=to think, scheme}}.<ref>{{R:sit:Luce 1981|page=41|head=-AM Finals (5. to Think, Plan)}}</ref>

====Definitions====
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# to [[supervise]]; to [[oversee]]
# {{lb|zh|historical}} [[proctor]]; [[supervisor]]
# to [[control]]; to [[take charge]]; to [[direct]]
# {{lb|zh|historical|of crown prince or senior statesman}} to [[act]] for the [[monarch]]
# {{lb|zh|historical}} [[duke]]s or [[prince]]s under an [[emperor]]
# {{lb|zh|obs-std}} to [[imprison]]; to [[incarcerate]]
# [[prison]]; [[jail]]
# {{lb|zh|obs-std}} to [[command]]; to [[lead]]
# {{lb|zh|Cantonese}} to [[force]] (somebody to do something)

====Definitions====
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# {{lb|zh|obs-std}} {{alt form|zh|鑒|t=[[mirror]]}}
# {{lb|zh|obs-std}} to [[reflect]]; to [[see]]; to [[view]]
#* {{zh-x|子曰：「周 監{jiàn} 於 二-代，郁郁-乎 文-哉！吾 從 ^周。」|The Master said, "{{w|Zhou dynasty|Zhou}} had the advantage of '''viewing''' the two past dynasties. How complete and elegant are its regulations! I follow Zhou."|ref=Analects}}
# {{lb|zh|obs-std}} to [[use]] for [[reference]]; to [[draw]] [[lesson]]s from
# {{lb|zh|historical}} [[supervisor]]; [[overseer]]
# {{lb|zh|historical}} [[imperial]] [[office]]
# {{lb|zh|historical}} [[eunuch]]
